text:
=D3=D5=C2=CF=D4=C1 09 =D7=C5=D2=C5=D3=C5=CE=D8 2006 19:04, Tian-Jian "Barab=
 bas" Jiang@Gmail, =F7=C9 =CE=C1=D0=C9=D3=C1=CC=C9:
 > Since it complained about ResourceBundle, I guess the suspect might be
 > locale settings.
 >
 > I've got error with zh_TW.Big5, but now it worked with en_US.UTF-8.
 
 Yes, these problems hit every once in a while :-( Please, report the
 bug to the ICU's developers:
 
 	http://ibm.com/software/globalization/icu
 
 Yours,
 
 	-mi
